product_name: 10' x 10' Mobile Chicken Coop Plans with 4' x 10' Elevated Coop House
target_customer: Backyard homesteaders with 0.25-5 acres rotating a small flock on pasture; suitable for approximately 10-12 laying hens or 30-45 broilers depending on setup, climate, management, and movement frequency.
product_claim: Digital DIY plans for a 10' x 10' mobile chicken coop/run with a 4' x 10' elevated coop house. Designed for approximately 10-12 laying hens or 30-45 broilers, depending on setup, climate, management, and movement frequency.

primary_specs.upper_coop_interior_area: About 40 sq ft before framing loss
primary_specs.upper_coop_wall_heights: 48 inch high side / 40 inch low side
primary_specs.roof: Lightweight sloped roof with approx. 8 inch fall across 48 inch depth
primary_specs.mobility: 4x6 skids + axle-mounted pneumatic wheels + tow tongue
primary_specs.hardware_cloth: 1/2 inch galvanized hardware cloth, 19 ga minimum

capacity_guidance.broilers_upper_practical_limit: 50 broilers only with frequent moves, good ventilation, enough feeders/waterers, shade, and heat management

etsy.file_packaging_note: Package as a few clean PDFs or ZIP files; Etsy instant digital listings allow up to five uploaded files, max 20 MB per file.

superseded_specs_do_not_use: 1/4 inch hardware cloth as main mesh
